metadata.purpose: Non-destructive decision overlay for terminology review.

decision_classes.bilingual-first-use: Use Chinese plus acronym/original on first use when helpful.
decision_classes.context-ui-label: Preserve exact label only when naming UI/parameter labels.
decision_classes.context-title: Preserve exact title/credit contexts; translate surrounding prose.
decision_classes.review-required: Needs manual page-context review before correction.
